mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review( user_id, shop_id, region, user_name, content, score_overall, score_taste, score_env, score_service, cost, currency, like_count, comment_count, audit_status, audit_remark, status, is_deleted, tags ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{shopId}, #{region}, #{userName}, #{content}, #{scoreOverall}, #{scoreTaste}, #{scoreEnv}, #{scoreService}, #{cost}, #{currency}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{auditStatus}, #{auditRemark}, #{status}, FALSE, #{tags} )
INSERT INTO review_image(review_id, url, media_type, sort_no) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{url}, #{mediaType}, #{sortNo})

INSERT INTO review_comment( review_id, user_id, user_name, content, parent_id, reply_to, status, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{reviewId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{replyTo}, #{status}, FALSE )
INSERT INTO review_report( review_id, reporter_user_id, reporter_user_name, reason, status, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{reviewId}, #{reporterUserId}, #{reporterUserName}, #{reason}, #{status}, FALSE )
mapper.sql: r.id, r.user_id, r.shop_id, r.region, s.name AS shop_name, r.user_name, r.content, r.score_overall, r.score_taste, r.score_env, r.score_service, r.cost, r.currency, r.like_count, r.comment_count, r.audit_status, r.audit_remark, r.status, r.is_deleted, r.tags, r.created_at, r.updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM review r LEFT JOIN shop s ON s.id = r.shop_id WHERE r.id = #{reviewId} AND r.is_deleted = FALSE

SELECT
FROM review r LEFT JOIN shop s ON s.id = r.shop_id WHERE r.id = #{reviewId} AND r.region = #{region} AND r.audit_status = 1 AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT id, review_id, url, media_type, sort_no FROM review_image WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC

SELECT rr.id, rr.review_id, rr.shop_id, rr.merchant_id, m.company_name AS merchant_name, rr.operator_id, rr.content, rr.created_at, rr.updated_at FROM review_merchant_reply rr JOIN merchant m ON m.id = rr.merchant_id WHERE rr.review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.sql: rc.id, rc.review_id, rc.user_id, rc.user_name, rc.content, rc.parent_id, rc.reply_to, reply.user_id AS reply_to_user_id, reply.user_name AS reply_to_user_name, reply.content AS reply_to_content, rc.status, rc.is_deleted, rc.created_at, rc.updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM review_comment rc
AND rc.parent_id = 0

SELECT
FROM review_comment rc LEFT JOIN review_comment reply ON reply.id = rc.reply_to AND reply.is_deleted = FALSE
AND rc.parent_id IN
#{parentId}
ORDER BY rc.parent_id DESC, rc.created_at ASC, rc.id ASC

SELECT
FROM review_comment rc LEFT JOIN review_comment reply ON reply.id = rc.reply_to AND reply.is_deleted = FALSE
AND rc.id = #{commentId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, review_id, reporter_user_id, reporter_user_name, reason, status, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM review_report WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND reporter_user_id = #{reporterUserId} AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE review_report SET status = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND status = 0 AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM review_comment WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET user_name = #{userName}, content = #{content}, score_overall = #{scoreOverall}, score_taste = #{scoreTaste}, score_env = #{scoreEnv}, score_service = #{scoreService}, cost = #{cost}, currency = #{currency}, audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, status = #{status}, tags = #{tags}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE review SET audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{reviewId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
UPDATE review SET like_count = #{likeCount}, comment_count = #{commentCount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{reviewId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT id, shop_id, score_overall, score_taste, score_env, score_service FROM review WHERE shop_id = #{shopId} AND audit_status = 1 AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE shop SET score = #{score}, taste_score = #{tasteScore}, env_score = #{envScore}, service_score = #{serviceScore}, review_count = #{reviewCount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{shopId} AND is_deleted = FALSE
